name: Bourbon Pate
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Can Sell's or other good-quality pate
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix cream cheese and pate in the bottom of a 3-cup mold. Chill.
2. Dissolve gelatin in cold water.
3. Heat beef broth and combine with gelatin.
4. When the pate mixture is firm, pour it over the gelatin.
5. Chill until set.
6. Unmold and serve with club crackers.
